servinfo.title: Gear Shift and Select Shaft Assembly Removal and Installation

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Gear Shift and Select Shaft Assembly Components

s1.ptxt: Remove battery and battery tray with ECM.
Disconnect gear shift and gear select control cables from transaxle.
Disconnect back up light switch connector.
Release engine left mounting from engine left mounting bracket.
Remove gear shift interlock bolt (1) and 5th to reverse interlock guide bolt (2) (if equipped) from transaxle case.
Remove gear shift guide case bolts (4) and gear shift & select shaft assembly (3).

attention2.ptxt: The fastener is pre-coated with friction stabilizer. If the fastener is reused, it may work loose.
Replace the fastener pre-coated with friction stabilizer with a new one.

s1.ptxt: Install gear shift & select shaft assembly with new gasket to transaxle.
Install gear shift & select shaft assembly in the following procedure.

s2.ptxt: Hand-tighten gear shift guide case No.1 bolt (1), No.3 bolt (3) and new gear shift guide case No.2 bolts (2).
Tighten gear shift guide case No.1 bolt (1) to specified torque.

torqueitem.t-part: Gear shift guide case No.1 bolt

s2.ptxt: Tighten gear shift guide case No.2 bolts (2) and No. 3 bolt (3) to specified torque.

torqueitem.t-part: Gear shift guide case No.2 bolt
Gear shift guide case No.3 bolt

s1.ptxt: Install new washer and new gear shift interlock bolt (4), and then tighten it to specified torque.
Install new washer (if equipped) and new 5th to reverse interlock guide bolt (5) (if equipped) and then tighten it to specified torque.
Reconnect engine left mounting to engine left mounting bracket.
Connect back up light switch connector.
Connect gear shift and gear select control cables to transaxle.
Install battery tray and battery, and then install coolant reservoir and ECM to battery tray.
Check input shaft for rotation in each gear position.
